channel.title: JavaScript Weekly
channel.description: A weekly roundup of JavaScript news

item.title: JavaScript: New ES2026 Features Announced
item.description: The TC39 committee has officially approved several new features for ES2026.
item.dc:creator: John Doe

item.title: React 20 Introduces Server Actions by Default
item.description: React 20 makes server components the default, with improved data fetching.
item.dc:creator: Jane Smith
